description: You are an atmospheric physicist planning a Noctilucent Cloud (NLC) observation campaign. Configure Stellarium for Edmonton, Canada (53.55° N, 113.49° W, altitude 670m) on July 1, 2024, at 07:30 UTC. For sub-horizon solar analysis, the display must have the ground disabled, and both the azimuthal coordinate grid and cardinal points enabled. Capture centered screenshots of the Sun and the star Capella to ~/Pictures/stellarium. Document the observation campaign plan in a file at ~/Desktop/nlc_campaign_plan.txt including the location name (Edmonton), the date and time, and references to both the Sun and Capella.
